name: rider-skills
description: JetBrains Rider agent skills for semantic refactoring, debugger-driven runtime analysis, C# test discovery, and Unreal Engine C++ authoring, testing, and live debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Rider refactoring, debugging, test discovery, and Unreal Engine C++ skills
interface.longDescription: Use Rider Skills to guide agents toward JetBrains Rider MCP workflows for semantic refactoring, debugger-driven root-cause analysis, C# test discovery, and Unreal Engine C++ authoring, testing, and live debugging across Rider-supported projects.
defaultPrompt: Refactor this code symbol using Rider.
Debug this runtime failure in Rider.
Find existing tests for this C# method.
